headline: How to Scale Your Practice Using AI-Driven Legal Referrals
articleBody: AI referrals are the new word-of-mouth. When someone asks a bot for the 'best injury lawyer in Dallas,' the AI relies on a specific set of data points to choose. If your firm isn't formatted for these models, you're invisible to a massive new lead source. We manage your AI presence so you stay top-of-mind without lifting a finger. Ready to lead the pack? Reach out to AI Visibility today.
